summary: Verified the retrieve_context alias addition in rag/retriever_node.py. All 52 pytest tests in tests/rag pass (51 pre-existing + 1 new alias test). Identity, __all__, and behavioural equivalence checks all pass. No regressions detected.

verification_results.original_retrieve_unchanged: PASS (all 5 prior retrieve tests pass: full_context, budgeting, scope skip, repair-pass enrichment, no enrichment on success)

critical_code_review_comments: Implementation is clean: `retrieve_context = retrieve` is true identity assignment (same function object, id() and `is` confirm). __all__ exports both names. The alias correctly does not duplicate logic, preserving the contract that retrieve(state: AgentState) -> AgentState remains the single source of truth.
seed_data_creation: None — tests use offline FakeEmbedder from tests/rag/conftest.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: rag/ is a pure Python library (no web server, no frontend). Run `cd /app && python -m pytest tests/rag -q`. retrieve_context is an identity alias of retrieve at rag/retriever_node.py:320. Both are exported via __all__ on line 322.
